disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Had a fall this morning when the legs gave way, and is now completely unable to rise from the chair or bear weight
trigger_question_examples: Can you stand or take any weight on your legs at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My legs gave out and I went down this morning. Now I can't get up out of the chair at all — there's no power to push up and I can't take any weight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Did not strike the head in the fall and is not on any blood thinner
trigger_question_examples: Did you hit your head when you went down?
Are you on any blood-thinning medication?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I didn't hit my head — I sort of slid down. I only take my blood pressure tablets, nothing for thinning the blood.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No severe hip, groin or back pain; denies point pain on the hip
trigger_question_examples: Do you have pain in your hip, groin or back?
Is any part of your leg or hip very painful to move?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No real pain in my hip or groin, just weak. I'm a bit stiff and sore from sitting here so long, that's all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Gradual generalised loss of strength over about a year, weak grip, slowed walking
trigger_question_examples: How long have your legs been getting weaker?
Has your walking or grip changed over time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been coming on for the best part of a year. My grip's gone weak, I can't open jars, and walking feels like wading through mud.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Poor dietary intake (tea and toast), poor appetite and recent weight loss
trigger_question_examples: What have you been eating lately?
Have you lost weight or lost your appetite?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly, mostly just tea and toast. I don't have much of an appetite and I've dropped some weight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, chills, urinary symptoms, chest pain or breathlessness
trigger_question_examples: Any fevers, chills, burning when you pass urine, chest pain or shortness of breath?
Do you feel hot, shivery or unwell in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or chills, no trouble with my waterworks, no chest pain and my breathing's fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new confusion; is alert and oriented, giving a clear account
trigger_question_examples: Have you been more muddled or confused than usual?
Does she seem her normal self mentally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my head's clear — I know exactly what happened, I just physically can't get up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Stranded on scene with only an elderly neighbour, unable to be lifted safely; no grab rails, very low chair
trigger_question_examples: Who is with you and can anyone help you move safely?
Is your home set up to help you get up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's just my neighbour here and we can't manage to lift me. There are no rails and this chair is far too low.
